name: 5.5 x 4.45 Photo Album Poppy Flowers - heyday™
description:
The 5.5 x 4.45 Photo Album Poppy Flowers from heyday™ features a vibrant poppy flower design, offering a colorful way to store memories. It holds up to 64 photos, each measuring 2.25 x 3.25 inches, across 16 pages. The album is crafted from durable material, ensuring longevity. The compact size makes it easy to store or display, while the multicolored theme suits various occasions, adding a lively touch to your photo collection.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
